name: copilot-dash
description: View and interact with Copilot CLI run results

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../extension && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "cd server && npm run dev" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run build:extension
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build
